title: Traditional British Spotted Dick Pudding
description: A classic British dessert made with suet and dried fruits, served with custard.
instructions: Grease a 1-pint pudding basin with butter.
In a large mixing bowl, combine suet, sugar, eggs, and milk. Mix well.
Add the spotted dick pudding mix and stir until combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared pudding basin.
Cover the pudding with a piece of parchment paper and tie with string.
Place the pudding in a large pot and add enough boiling water to come halfway up the side of the pudding.
Cover the pot and simmer for 2 hours.
Remove the pudding from the pot and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the pudding with custard and enjoy.
